test.command: tmux -L svc_test kill-server 2>/dev/null || true && tmux -L svc_test -f /Users/ict/.config/tmux/tmux.conf new-session -d -s svc_test && tmux -L svc_test source-file /Users/ict/.config/tmux/tmux.conf && tmux -L svc_test list-keys -T prefix >/dev/null && tmux -L svc_test list-keys -T workspace_agent >/dev/null && tmux -L svc_test kill-server 2>/dev/null || true

typecheck.command: printf 'No language typecheck step defined for shell/tmux mission\n'

appliedUpdates.description: Added commands.test_workspace_actions to run tmux-workspace-agent/tests/workspace-actions.sh so workers have a dedicated command for deterministic workspace action coverage (including kill/fallback branches).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit TERM compatibility guidance for interactive tmux validation (e.g., set TERM=screen-256color when driving tmux via tuistory) to reduce terminal-type failures.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: workspace-launcher-create-switch-rename review observed this guidance requested in worker handoff while already documented in .factory/library/user-testing.md but absent from the tmux-plugin-worker skill instructions.
